{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202165935B18A7F78985811D6DC"}"},"total":1031},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615581255694336793","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这超对味的游戏反套路爽文！以监狱典狱长视角对抗入侵者，开局资源窘迫却靠硬核战术智取，游戏设定贴合逻辑，节奏紧凑爽点足，越读越上头！[雀食神作][已种草][书架加一]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773143511,"group_id":"7594661573939956760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"🍋了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwyfHuo2AUACwTejDkr9Q4M=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/81514e0856ff497d83877ec298c2bca1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700987&x-signature=yFuvOKzuVX3TE%2B4kF14X%2FDusuOE%3D","user_id":"117009333890699","user_name":"惭愿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"117009333890699","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594661573939956760","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏世界+三角洲同人+无女主】
魔王护韩澈在电脑桌前猝死，穿越到另一个世界，在这里他有一个更广为人知的代号——格赫罗斯。
韩澈:“也就是说，现在我在潮汐监狱，而我就是典狱长？”
【是的，典狱长阁下，请您坚守岗位，完成自己的职责】
韩澈:“我该怎么做？”
【你只需做你自己】
韩澈:“做我自己么……”
“老大，老大!”
韩澈:“慌什么？怎么了？”
“有人闯进来了，和咱们的人已经交手了!”
“还有就是渡鸦……”
韩澈:“呵呵呵，有意思，那咱们也上吧。”
【系统，放我出去。】
【好的，典狱长阁下，请做好准备】
“典狱长阁下将亲自指挥安保部门平息暴动，肃
清渡鸦势力，请所有工作人员注意配合行动!”
既然是做我自己，那么……
“新世界不能没有钢铁秩序!群星已回归轨道!”
“罪恶，必须，接受审判!”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83e4a961940873c6ec0667d135e24df4","author":"生姜和鱼饼","author_id":"","book_id":"7594661573939956760","book_name":"三角洲：你说谁实力受损？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"30万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594662488151441944","read_count":"299221","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"281205"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"131","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,网游,无女主,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od81e25d3d7ea407a591fafdd774d0822~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301019&x-signature=eWPl83EqcpJK5B%2FEcI91a6lOCXE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3721221555107656","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202165935B18A7F78985811D6DC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6721,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3058},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7609525367331275544","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写史莱姆化形成吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空在魔神战争中大战几百回合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必。表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨。但我比较心思荷鲁斯对花果山108个猴子说的一句话“小伙子一身做骨，别在你鲁哥面前摆谱，知道大天使酱是怎么做的吗？总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系明确，伏笔众多。打斗场面如身临其境，人物性格描述也很到位！","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":28,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741170195811D6DC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227609525367331275544%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227594661573939956760%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771733208,"group_id":"7594661573939956760","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"女王大人嘿嘿嘿我的女王大人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2EwHP3+kS2sNn5rpXn79NI5hD6A+nFUxa17u0H+MgIQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/02ad92f7ee2d4af9a09df0c293245b9f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706645&x-signature=Pti%2F%2FaMokJm6DdllxSwlkdCqWuU%3D","user_id":"2272050984006915","user_name":"一只贝拉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2272050984006915","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"75946
